title: Phlegmariurus hexastichus
taxonomy: Phlegmariurus hexastichus is classified as a species of plant in the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant is a member of the genus Phlegmariurus, which is part of the larger group Lycopodiopsida. Phlegmariurus hexastichus is a type of club moss, a group of small, non-vascular plants. The classification of Phlegmariurus hexastichus places it within the division Lycopodiophyta. This division is part of the larger kingdom Plantae.
